Miracle-Gro Plant Food Granules All Purpose video Merchant video Previous page Grows plants twice as big Feed your plants the nutrients they need to grow twice as big (versus unfed plants)! Unique blend of 10 nutrients The perfect blend of 10 nutrients and minerals that ensure your plants grow beautiful and bountiful. Feeds plants for up to 6 months Our ‘smart feed’ system releases food only when needed. One feed lasts the whole season. Pet and child friendly Suitable for use as directed in areas where children and pets have access. Next page 1 Grows Twice As Big 2 Blend Of 10 Nutrients 3 Feeds For Up To 6 Months 4 Pet & Child Friendly Feeds your plants for the entire season with just one application No need for constant feeds! Just one application in spring works continuously for 6 months through to the end of the growing season. Specially developed temperature-controlled coating regulates the release of nutrients to when conditions are right for feeding. A blend of essential nutrients to ensure strong, healthy plants all season long. Why should I use Miracle-Gro All Purpose Continuous Release Plant Food? Plants need more than just water, they need the right balance of essential nutrients to grow and bloom their best. Miracle-Gro feeds your plants the nutrients they need that are ​easily absorbed to grow your plants twice as big versus unfed plants! Where can I use Miracle-Gro All Purpose Continuous Release Plant Food? Miracle-Gro All Purpose Continuous Release Plant Food is ideal for all plants indoors and outdoors. Perfect for pots and containers, hanging baskets, beds and borders. Can be used for feeding fruit and vegetable crops. When should I use Miracle-Gro All Purpose Continuous Release Plant Food? Only one application required for the entire year. For outdoor plants, use between March and September, when plants are actively growing. For indoor plants, can be used at any time of the year when plants are actively growing. How do I use Miracle-Gro All Purpose Continuous Release Plant Food? Evenly scatter granules over the compost or soil around your plants following the recommended dosage for plant type on label. Gently work the granules into the soil or mix thoroughly into compost. product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Keep out of reach of children and pets. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. Do not ingest. Use gloves and other protective clothing when handling. Store in a cool, dry place away from heat sources and open flames. Do not apply in windy conditions to avoid drift and potential harm to nearby plants and animals. In case of accidental exposure or ingestion, seek medical attention immediately.
